title: Scuffles
description: Adds ton of new vanilla friendly weaponary weapons to Minecraft!
body:
## 🗡️ About

This mod adds lot of new vanilla friendly weapons

## 🗡️ Other Media

If you found a bug, or want to suggest your own idea you can chat with me about it on our [Discord]

You can support me or buy texture pack on the [Patreon]

Also check out my [PMC page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/WindyBee/)

## 🗡️ Details


<details>
<summary>Craftings</summary>

![Craftings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7fb50c46011a95665700f71d34a367a4019958e.png)

**Same with other minerals, just replace Diamonds with Iron Ingots, Planks etc. and Diamond Shards with Nuggets, Sticks, Rocks**

</details>
